title: Four NASA payloads to fly on Astrolab’s first lunar rover
description: WASHINGTON — Astrolab’s first lunar rover will carry four NASA payloads on a mission planned to launch later this year.

title: Tomorrow.io adds $35 million to DeepSky funding round
description: TAMPA, Fla. — Weather intelligence provider Tomorrow.io has added $35 million to its latest funding round, bringing the total to $210 million to accelerate development of a next-generation constellation for gathering atmospheric data.

title: SpaceX launches CRS-34 cargo mission to ISS
Intuitive Machines to buy ground station company
description: WASHINGTON — Intuitive Machines has agreed to purchase a company that operates ground stations in the United States and United Kingdom to help build out a lunar communications network.

title: AST SpaceMobile may use ULA’s Vulcan
description: WASHINGTON — AST SpaceMobile may launch some of its direct-to-device satellites on United Launch Alliance’s Vulcan rocket to expand the launch options for its constellation.

title: Armada, Johnson Controls partner on Arizona factory for modular data center production
description: Armada announced today that Johnson Controls has made an equity investment to support construction of a 400,000-square-foot factory for continuous modular data center produc
